boonBarrelDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> original 4-block ultravibes spawn as Square.
boonBeeDescription: <chance>1 in 5 chance</chance> orange ultravibes spawn as Honeycomb.
boonBobDescription: <chance>1 in 2 chance</chance> at round end to add one Brick Ultravibe to your Stack.
boonBoomerDescription: <chance>1 in 5 chance</chance> to destroy the stack ultravibe on discard
boonBountyDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> at round end to add a random Special Ultravibe to your Stack.
boonBushDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> green ultravibes spawn as Moss.
boonCubbitDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> huge ultravibes spawn as a random small shape.
boonCyclopDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> original 4-block ultravibes spawn as Line.
boonDoctorDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> red ultravibes spawn as Heart.
boonDropperDescription: <chance>1 in 5 chance</chance> blue ultravibes spawn as Trash.
boonDuplicatorDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> at round end to add a copy of a random Stack Ultravibe.
boonEagleDescription: On line clear near the top of the grid, reduce Ability cooldown by 5 seconds.
boonGolemDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> square ultravibes spawn as Brick.
boonGooDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> green ultravibes spawn as Slime.
boonHalfDescription: Negative ultravibes have <chance>1 in 5 chance</chance> to become Disabled on spawn
boonJesterDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> ultravibes spawn as a random variant.
boonLibertyDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> blue ultravibes spawn as Moss, Honeycomb, or Slime.
boonLucky777Description: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> orange ultravibes spawn as Lucky.
boonMagic8Description: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> to create a Consumable when you place an 8-Block Ultravibe
boonMeowDescription: <chance>1 in 32 chance</chance> to create a Consumable on Ultravibe placement.
boonMicrochipDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> blue ultravibes spawn as Cog.
boonMirrorDescription: <chance>1 in 100 chance</chance> to duplicate a Ultravibe on placement.
boonMushroomDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> on consumable use to gain +1 Discard.
boonPirateDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> on line clear with Trash to gain +1 Discard.
boonUltraphantDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> small ultravibes spawn as big ones.
boonRageDescription: <chance>1 in 2 chance</chance> on line clear while you have no Discards to gain +1 Discard.
boonRangerDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> on line clear to reduce Ability cooldown by 4 seconds.
boonRetroDescription: Each original (4-block) ultravibe placement reduces Ability cooldown by 1 second.
boonSantaDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> at round end to create a Consumable.
boonSlayerDescription: <chance>1 in 2 chance</chance> on Quadra clear to create a Consumable.
boonSunflowerDescription: <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> at round end to lower Negative spawn chance.
boonUrfDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> on placement within 3 seconds of your previous placement to heal a random negative block on the grid.
boonVampireDescription: <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> negative variants spawn as their base color instead.
boonWizardDescription: <chance>1 in 10 chance</chance> on placement to convert a random negative block into a variant.
